pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states 'Create a **Scatter Plot** visualization'; DHIS2 Documentation (https://docs.dhis2.org/en/implement/health/immunization/immunization-triangulation-dashboard/design.html) confirms scatter plots are a standard visualization type for immunization analysis; Web search confirms scatter plots plot 'two variables as points on a Cartesian plane' and are used in DHIS2 for 'Performance - coverage vs dropout' immunization reports

Task description explicitly specifies 'Set the Period to **2023**'; DHIS2 environment README (evidence_docs/README.md) confirms Sierra Leone demo database was verified as operational on 2026-02-14 and contains current immunization data; Referenced anc_pivot_table_analysis task (similar task in same environment) confirms 2023 data exists in the Sierra Leone DHIS2 demo database

Task description explicitly states 'Set the Organisation Units to show all **Districts** in Sierra Leone'; Web search confirms 'Sierra Leone has four organizational unit levels: National, District, Chiefdom, and Facility' (DHIS2 databases: https://databases.dhis2.org/); DHIS2 environment README confirms 1332 organisation units are present in the database, including the district level; Verified through anc_pivot_table_analysis task which confirms 'Sierra Leone has 14 districts'

Task description explicitly mentions 'Penta 1 doses given' and 'Penta 3 doses given' as the required data elements; Web search confirms 'DHIS2 systems track Pentavalent vaccine data through multiple data elements, including Total Pentavalent doses given (Penta1 + Penta2 + Penta3)' (https://docs.dhis2.org/en/implement/health/immunization/immunization-triangulation-dashboard/design.html); Verifier.py uses these exact keywords to search data item names ('has_penta1', 'has_penta3'); DHIS2 Documentation confirms Pentavalent (DPT/Penta) is part of EPI routine immunization module

Task description explicitly states 'Export the data from your visualization as a **CSV** file to `/home/ga/Downloads/`'; Web search confirms DHIS2 Data Visualizer 'supports downloading the data source of a visualization in JSON, XML, Excel, CSV, JXRML or Raw data SQL formats' (https://community.dhis2.org/t/best-way-to-export-data-as-csv-or-excel-format/46333); DHIS2 Documentation on Data Visualizer (https://docs.dhis2.org/en/use/user-guides/dhis-core-version-master/analysing-data/data-visualizer.html) confirms export capability

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a scatter plot in DHIS2 2.40.11 using the Sierra Leone demo database, which contains 1332 organisation units including 14 districts. The scatter plot must visualize Penta 1 doses given (Y-axis) versus Penta 3 doses given (X-axis) at the district level for the 2023 period. These pentavalent (DPT) data elements are part of the standard DHIS2 immunization module. The visualization must be saved as a favorite, have public access set to 'Can view', and the data must be exported as a CSV file. All metadata claims are verified against the task description, DHIS2 official documentation, and operational confirmation of the DHIS2 2.40.11 Sierra Leone demo environment.
